summary: First testing pass on Leonida Vice GTA 6 fansite. Backend sanity (/api/ and /api/status) verified. Comprehensive frontend tests cover all routes (Home, News + 6 articles, Characters + details, Locations + details, Vehicles + filters, Trailers + YouTube modal, Soundtrack), navbar/mobile menu, footer, countdown, and rail scroll buttons. All critical flows pass with no JS errors. Spectacle elements (drop cap, pull-quote blockquote, hero, countdown, neon fonts) all render correctly.
action_items: (Optional/Minor) Home hero 'Watch Trailer' button navigates to /trailers but does not auto-open the trailer modal — consider auto-opening the featured trailer modal on arrival via state/query param for stronger CTA.
(Optional/Minor) Home rail scroll buttons only shift scrollLeft by ~54px per click (very small step). Consider scrolling by ~80% of the visible viewport or one card width for smoother UX.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: clean and minimal — appropriately excludes Mongo _id and serializes datetime to ISO; matches project's static seed-data intent.
Frontend: ScrollToTop component correctly resets scroll on route change.
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes as documented in the request — excellent testability.
No business-logic backend code expected; backend serves only sanity endpoints as designed.
seed_data_creation: None. App is static seed-data driven on the frontend.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All routes and core interactions verified at desktop 1920x1080 and mobile 390x844. Backend has only /api/ (Hello World) and /api/status (POST/GET). Vehicles filter narrows 21->5 for muscle/sports. Trailer modal embeds youtube.com/embed with autoplay=1 and closes cleanly. All 6 article slugs render hero + drop cap + blockquote + 3 related items. Characters: 2 protagonists + 8 supporting. Locations: 12 grid items. Soundtrack: 3 songs + 6 stations (intentional confirmed-only list). Mobile nav-menu-toggle opens mobile-nav-panel correctly. No JS console errors observed across pages.
